majorTraces.name: Plunder
majorTraces.description: If an enemy target is currently receiving DoT, when Kafka's Skill hits this enemy, she deals additional Lightning DMG equal to 25% of her ATK to this enemy.

majorTraces.name: Fortissimo
majorTraces.description: When using her Ultimate, Kafka's ATK increases by 30% for 2 turns.

majorTraces.name: Tick-Tock
majorTraces.description: When entering battle, if there are teammates following the Path of Nihility, Kafka's DMG increases by 30% for each Nihility teammate (up to 2).
